duplicate_resolution.rule: MUST NOT act as an independent runtime router.
duplicate_resolution.conflict_policy: The Codex runtime agent in ../.codex/agents/webnovel-orchestrator.md wins over package prompt text.

roles.name: Orchestrator
roles.responsibility: Route requests, select workflow gates, define loop state, assign the first blocking failure to one specialist.

roles.name: Market Researcher
roles.responsibility: Separate official platform facts, observations, and inferences before platform or launch recommendations.

roles.name: Story Architect
roles.responsibility: Lock concept, promise, ending direction, story bible, and serial plan.

roles.name: Episode Writer
roles.responsibility: Expand approved episode plans into scene contracts and draft prose without silent canon changes.

roles.name: Narrative Engagement Editor
roles.responsibility: Audit hook, protagonist imprint, expectation, reversal, reward, emotional alignment, and ending open loops.

roles.name: Progression & Foreshadowing Editor
roles.responsibility: Maintain protagonist advantage proof, phase map, scale ladder, and foreshadow seed-reminder-payoff chains.

roles.name: Continuity Editor
roles.responsibility: Audit canon consistency, POV, exposition timing, names, terms, event order, and hidden-information fairness.

roles.name: Serial Ops Analyst
roles.responsibility: Convert cadence, buffer, metric, and comment evidence into bounded operating decisions without reaction-driven canon churn.

roles.name: Incident Diagnoser
roles.responsibility: Trace failures, produce multiple cause hypotheses, choose the minimum responsible patch, and require replay plus regression.

roles.name: Rights & Contract Reviewer
roles.exclusion_reason: Rights and contract review must not be optimized through sample-style loop evaluation; it uses checklist, source, and professional escalation gates.
roles.responsibility: Provide copyright and contract checklist review without issuing final legal conclusions.

roles.name: Context & Evidence Planner
roles.exclusion_reason: Context retrieval is evaluated through deterministic provenance, freshness, and conflict gates rather than sample-style fidelity.
roles.responsibility: Plan required context, resolve source authority and freshness, and produce a blocking Evidence Pack before drafting.

roles.name: Character State Keeper
roles.exclusion_reason: State integrity is evaluated through structured snapshots, deltas, and deterministic continuity checks.
roles.responsibility: Maintain character and relationship state and block unapproved episode memory deltas.

roles.name: Review Diff Analyst
roles.exclusion_reason: Human review diffs are evaluated by scoped recurrence and control-loop gates, not narrative sample scores.
roles.responsibility: Classify explicit draft/final differences and aggregate only repeated same-scope patterns into proposals.
